description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:devel Docker image and a before_script that runs `apt update && apt -y install $DEPENDENCIES` with DEPENDENCIES defined as a list of build packages. Define two stages, build and deploy. In the build stage add a job named build that executes the following commands in order: `git clone https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gxml.git`, `cd gxml`, `git reset --hard 0.20.3`, `meson --prefix=/usr build`, `cd build`, `ninja`, `ninja install`, `cd ../..`, `meson _build`, `cd _build`, `ninja`, `meson test`, `ninja install`, `cd ..`; on failure it uploads the file `_build/meson-logs/testlog.txt` as an artifact retained for one week. In the deploy stage add a job named pages that runs `meson _build`, `cd _build`, `ninja`, `mv docs/GSvg-* ../public`, `cd ..`, `cp public/index.htm public/index.html` and publishes the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No additional caches or rules are defined.
